name: lily-photography
description: Lily Patrick Photography portfolio with admin management

scripts.hash-password: node -e "const crypto = require('crypto'); const pw = process.argv[1]; console.log(crypto.createHash('sha256').update(pw).digest('hex'));"
scripts.setup: npm install && node -e "const crypto = require('crypto'); const fs = require('fs'); const hash = crypto.createHash('sha256').update('lilyphoto').digest('hex'); fs.writeFileSync('.env', 'ADMIN_PASSWORD_HASH=' + hash + '\nPORT=3000\n'); console.log('Created .env with default password: lilyphoto');"
